examples: The police were shocked by the savagery of the attacks.
It was a clinical operation, but awesome in the scale of its savagery.
We have to understand that goodness must also be able to injure — to injure savagery.
Your comfortable life has been supplanted by one of savagery and living on the edge.
The sudden savagery of Q4 might be the best reason to have hope for 2009.
